red_test.reason: AO2 source and offline tests are audited without changing runtime code or invoking providers

targeted_test.command: cargo test -p ao2-adapters --offline && cargo test -p ao2-runtime --offline
targeted_test.output: AO2 adapter and runtime offline suites passed, including approval subject digest, content/base repository binding, tamper rejection, exact approval replay, and provider-free scripted paths.

integration_test.output: Runtime approval replay, provider-backed fixture, pulse, risky-PR, schema, and provider-free tests passed offline.

status_test.command: source inspection of SandboxPatchApprovalSubject and auto-approval branch
status_test.output: Approval subject includes base_commit and complete operation bytes; runtime still has AO2_AUTO_APPROVE_SANDBOX_PATCH with approver human:local-user-auto-approve.

next_test.command: negative design assertion: auto approval and absent explicit approval-subject transfer remain non-promotable
next_test.output: The audit keeps safe_to_execute false for live AO2 approval hardening and does not claim provider execution or promotion.

objective: Coordinate ao2 AO2 approval byte and base commit binding design test through a bounded Atlas compatibility evidence node with no promotion.
